query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `agentMessages` (
  `id` varchar(36) NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
  `conversationId` varchar(36) NOT NULL,
  `role` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `content` text,
  `toolCalls` json,
  `toolCallId` varchar(255),
  `metadata` json,
  `createdAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
